fn extend_from_temp(a: &[u8], b: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    let temp: Vec<u8> = a.to_vec();
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    result.extend_from_slice(&temp);
    result.extend_from_slice(b);
    result
}

fn merge_slices(slices: &[&[i32]]) -> Vec<i32> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    for slice in slices {
        let temp: Vec<i32> = slice.to_vec();
        result.extend(temp);
    }
    result
}

fn concat_strings(a: &str, b: &str) -> String {
    let temp = a.to_string();
    let mut result = String::new();
    result.push_str(&temp);
    result.push_str(b);
    result
}
